book.title: Learning XML
book.author: Erik T. Ray
book.description: A comprehensive guide to XML for beginners and intermediate users, covering document structure, DTD, XPath, and XSLT transformations.

book.title: Web Development Basics
book.author: John Smith
book.description: Covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern web development practices for building responsive and interactive websites.

book.title: Introduction to Programming
book.author: David Miller
book.description: A thorough introduction to programming concepts using Python, covering algorithms, data structures, and problem-solving strategies.

book.title: Database Management Systems
book.author: Raghu Ramakrishnan
book.description: The definitive text on relational databases covering SQL, normalization, transactions, indexing, and query optimization techniques.

book.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach
book.author: Stuart Russell
book.description: The most comprehensive and authoritative text on artificial intelligence, covering search algorithms, knowledge representation, machine learning, and neural networks.

book.title: Clean Code
book.author: Robert C. Martin
book.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship, teaching developers how to write readable, maintainable, and efficient code with real-world refactoring examples.

book.title: Computer Networks
book.author: Andrew S. Tanenbaum
book.description: Covers all aspects of computer networking including TCP/IP protocols, routing algorithms, network security, and wireless communications.

book.title: Operating System Concepts
book.author: Abraham Silberschatz
book.description: Known as the 'Dinosaur Book', this classic text covers processes, memory management, storage, and security in modern operating systems.

book.title: Data Structures and Algorithms
book.author: Thomas H. Cormen
book.description: Introduction to Algorithms is the authoritative reference on algorithm design and analysis, covering sorting, graph algorithms, dynamic programming, and NP-completeness.

book.title: Machine Learning Yearning
book.author: Andrew Ng
book.description: Practical guide from Andrew Ng on how to structure machine learning projects, diagnose errors, and build high-performing AI systems efficiently.

book.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
book.author: David Thomas
book.description: A classic software development guide covering career building, technical excellence, and practical tips to become a more effective and versatile programmer.

book.title: Deep Learning
book.author: Ian Goodfellow
book.description: The definitive textbook on deep learning by world-class researchers, covering neural network architectures, optimization, regularization, and sequence modeling.

book.title: Software Engineering at Google
book.author: Titus Winters
book.description: Real lessons from engineering at Google scale — covering software culture, processes, and tools used to build reliable, maintainable large-scale systems.

book.title: Cybersecurity Essentials
book.author: Charles J. Brooks
book.description: Comprehensive coverage of cybersecurity concepts including threat analysis, ethical hacking, network security, cryptography, and incident response strategies.

book.title: Cloud Computing: Concepts and Technology
book.author: Thomas Erl
book.description: Explores fundamental cloud computing concepts, service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), virtualization technologies, and deployment in modern enterprise environments.
